source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/15_규격 Test/2. [A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW] IEC 60601-1 CB Test report (3.1).pdf

document.title: IEC 60601-1 CB Test Certificate and Test Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
document.documentType: IECEE CB Test Certificate and IEC 60601-1 CB Test Report
document.revisionOrVersion: CB Certificate No. NO124542; Test Report No. REP001824; TRF No. IEC60601_1S; TRF template IECEE OD-2020-F1:2020 Ed.1.3

sourceSummary.oneLine: IECEE CB certificate and IEC 60601-1 test report for H&abyz A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory submissions and conformity evidence for basic safety and essential performance under IEC 60601-1 CB Scheme testing, including national differences and collateral standard references.
keyPoints: A sample of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector was tested and found in conformity with IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012 and IEC 60601-1-6:2010 + AMD1:2013.
The product fulfills IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012 and EN 60601-1:2006 + A1:2013, with national differences addressed for Canada, Japan, Korea, and the United States.
Risk management results were documented by the manufacturer using ISO 14971:2007 and reviewed by Nemko.

The equipment is classified as Class I when used with the power supply box, internally powered when disconnected from mains, Type B applied part at the detector front panel, IP54 for the detector, and continuous operation.
PEMS/software compliance is documented against IEC 62304:2006 with software classified as Class B.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Applicant, manufacturer, and factory are listed as H&abyz Co., Ltd., 1F, 2-dong, 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-myeon, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea.

entities.name: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Name of Testing Laboratory preparing the report: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; CB Testing Laboratory address: 165-51 Yurim-ro, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea.

entities.name: Nemko
entities.evidence: CB Test Certificate is issued by the National Certification Body at Philip Pedersens vei 11, NO-1366 Lysaker, Norway.

entities.name: IECEE CB Scheme
entities.evidence: Certificate header states IEC System for Mutual Recognition of Test Certificates for Electrical Equipment (IECEE) CB Scheme.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product and test item description are both listed as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.

entities.name: DEPS9601 / DEPS9601A
entities.evidence: Power supply box types DEPS9601 and DEPS9601A were separately tested and certified by Nemko under CBTC No. NO82590/A1/M2 and NO96755/M1.

entities.name: ELT-3S1PA
entities.evidence: Rechargeable Li-ion battery type ELT-3S1PA was separately tested and certified by UL under DK-70440-UL according to IEC 62133:2017.

entities.name: Dell Latitude
entities.evidence: All testing was conducted with the PC submitted by manufacturer, Type: Latitude, manufactured by Dell Inc., as representative.

concepts.name: CB Scheme conformity
concepts.evidence: A sample was tested and found in conformity with IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD1:2013 and IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012; report references REP001824 and REP001824_1.

concepts.name: National differences
concepts.evidence: National differences for Canadian, Japan, Korea, and United States are listed, and all CENELEC members are addressed according to EN 60601-1:2006 +A1:2013.

concepts.name: Electrical safety classification
concepts.evidence: Class I for power supply box or internally powered for detector; Type B applied part for detector front panel; IP54 detector; continuous operation.

concepts.name: Risk management process
concepts.evidence: Risk management results are documented by the manufacturer on the basis of ISO 14971:2007 and reviewed by Nemko.

concepts.name: Usability engineering
concepts.evidence: Usability engineering process was evaluated according to IEC 60601-1-6:2010 + AMD1:2013 with IEC 62366 checklist.

concepts.name: Programmable electrical medical systems
concepts.evidence: PEMS requirements apply; IEC 62304 clauses apply; software classification is Class B; validation and risk management are documented in A-TCF-5-131 and FMEA A-TCF-5-105.

concepts.name: End-product ME system limitation
concepts.evidence: Clause 16 ME system is not covered; compliance shall be tested and evaluated in the end-product X-ray system including operating PC.

evidence.claim: The CB certificate covers a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model references A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Product: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector; Model / Type Ref. A1717MCW; A1417MCW; F1417MCW.

evidence.claim: The CB certificate number is NO124542 and the associated test report references are REP001824 and REP001824_1.
evidence.evidenceText: Ref. Certif. No. NO124542; Test Report Ref. No. REP001824 and REP001824_1.

evidence.claim: The report was issued on 2022-11-08 under IEC 60601-1 for medical electrical equipment basic safety and essential performance.
evidence.evidenceText: TEST REPORT IEC 60601-1 Medical Electrical Equipment Part 1; Report Number REP001824; Date of issue 2022-11-08.

evidence.claim: The test specification standard for the main report is IEC 60601-1:2005, AMD1:2012 under the CB Scheme.
evidence.evidenceText: Standard: IEC 60601-1:2005, AMD1:2012; Test procedure: CB Scheme.

evidence.claim: The device was found in conformity with IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD1:2013 and IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012.
evidence.evidenceText: A sample of the product was tested and found to be in conformity with IEC 60601-1-6:2010, IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD1:2013, IEC 60601-1:2005, IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012.

evidence.claim: The product fulfills IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012 and EN 60601-1:2006 + A1:2013, with national differences addressed for CA, JP, KR, and US.
evidence.evidenceText: National differences for Canadian (CA), Japan (JP), Korea (KR) and United States (US); product fulfils IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012 and EN 60601-1:2006 + A1:2013.

evidence.claim: Risk management was documented by the manufacturer based on ISO 14971:2007 and reviewed by Nemko.
evidence.evidenceText: RM Results are documented by the manufacturer on the basis of ISO 14971:2007 referring to OD-2044 from IECEE, and are reviewed by Nemko.

evidence.claim: The expected service life considered in the risk management file is 5 years.
evidence.evidenceText: EXPECTED SERVICE LIFE stated in RISK MANAGEMENT FILE: 5 years was considered.

evidence.claim: The equipment is classified as Class I when the power supply box is connected to mains and internally powered when disconnected from mains.
evidence.evidenceText: Classified as class I ME equipment when the power supply box is connected to the supply mains; classified as internally powered ME equipment when the power supply box is disconnected to the mains.

evidence.claim: The detector front panel is a Type B applied part and the detector has IP54 ingress protection.
evidence.evidenceText: Front panel of digital flat panel X-ray detector is classified as type B applied part; IP54 for digital flat panel X-ray detector.

evidence.claim: The equipment is intended for general radiographic diagnosis of adult and pediatric anatomy in hospital or institutional healthcare environments, but not for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: Designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children; intended for hospital or other institutional healthcare environment; not intended for mammography.

evidence.claim: A1717MCW is the main model; A1417MCW and F1417MCW are variants differing by model name, dimension, weight, and fire enclosure material.
evidence.evidenceText: The main model is A1717MCW; variants A1417MCW and F1417MCW are identical except for model name, dimension, weight and material of fire enclosure.

evidence.claim: The representative testing was conducted with main model A1717MCW unless otherwise specified.
evidence.evidenceText: Unless otherwise specified, all testing was conducted with the main model A1717MCW as representative.

evidence.claim: The detector technical specifications include a-Si TFT sensor, CsI scintillator, 140 μm pixel pitch, maximum 3.57 lp/mm limiting resolution, and 40-150 kV energy range.
evidence.evidenceText: Technical specification: Sensor type a-Si TFT; Scintillator Csl; Pixel pitch 140 μm; Limiting resolution Max. 3.57 lp/mm; Energy range 40-150 kV.

evidence.claim: Testing was performed from 2022-10-05 to 2022-10-28 after receipt of the test item on 2022-10-03.
evidence.evidenceText: Date of receipt of test item: 2022-10-03; Date(s) of performance of tests: 2022-10-05 2022-10-28.

evidence.claim: The power supply box DEPS9601/DEPS9601A was separately tested and certified by Nemko to IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012.
evidence.evidenceText: Power supply box, type DEPS9601 and DEPS9601A have been separately tested and certified by Nemko according to IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012.

evidence.claim: The rechargeable Li-ion battery ELT-3S1PA was separately tested and certified by UL to IEC 62133:2017.
evidence.evidenceText: Rechargeable Li-ion battery, type ELT-3S1PA has been separately tested and certified by UL (DK-70440-UL) according to IEC 62133:2017.

evidence.claim: Biocompatibility was declared by the manufacturer to comply with ISO 10993-1 but was not evaluated in this test report.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer has declared compliance with ISO 10993-1. Biocompatibility is not evaluated as part of this test report.

evidence.claim: Electromagnetic compatibility was declared by the manufacturer to comply with IEC 60601-1-2 and documented by the manufacturer.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer has declared that the equipment is in compliance with IEC 60601-1-2 Electromagnetic disturbances. Compliance is documented by the manufacturer.

evidence.claim: Clause 16 ME system compliance was not covered and must be evaluated in the end-product X-ray system including operating PC.
evidence.evidenceText: This test report does not cover clause 16; compliance shall be tested and evaluated in the end-product (X-ray system including operating PC).

evidence.claim: PEMS/software was documented as compliant with IEC 62304:2006 and classified as Software Class B.
evidence.evidenceText: When requirements apply, IEC 62304:2006 clauses 4.3, 5, 7, 8 and 9 apply; Complying with IEC 62304; Software Class: B.

evidence.claim: The user manual includes instructions for use and technical description, and has document number A-TCF-5-130 with revision number and revision date.
evidence.evidenceText: User manual includes the technical description; instructions for use contain a unique version identifier: document No. (A-TCF-5-130), revision No. and revision date.

evidence.claim: Leakage current testing, dielectric strength testing, and ingress protection checks passed for applicable IEC 60601-1 clauses in this chunk.
evidence.evidenceText: Leakage current limits: see appended table 8.7, verdict P; dielectric strength: see appended table 8.8.3, verdict P; IP Code tests per IEC 60529, verdict P.

evidence.claim: The equipment does not produce X-radiation and is not intended to produce diagnostic or therapeutic X-radiation.
evidence.evidenceText: The equipment does not produce X-radiation; equipment not intended to produce diagnostic or therapeutic X-radiation.

evidence.claim: The equipment is not intended for use in oxygen-rich environments, flammable anesthetics, or flammable agents.
evidence.evidenceText: The equipment is not intended for use in oxygen rich environments; not intended for use with flammable anesthetics; not intended for use in conjunction with flammable agents.

reviewFlags.reason: This extraction is limited to chunk 1 of 6 and does not include later pages or appendices beyond the provided text.
Several claims refer to appended tables and attachments that are cited in this chunk but not fully visible here.
The source chunk ends mid-clause 14.12, so no facts were extracted beyond the visible PEMS text.
